instructions: Update the `.jitsurules` file to explicitly define the execution environment. Instruct the agent that it MUST NEVER use system `python3` or global `pytest`. It must ALWAYS use `uv run <command>` (e.g., `uv run pytest`) or `just <recipe>` (e.g., `just verify-fast`) for all execution, testing, and linting.
anti_patterns: Do not instruct the agent to manually activate virtual environments or reference `./.venv/bin/python` directly.

instructions: Update the `ContextCompiler` in `src/jitsu/core/compiler.py` to automatically include an 'Execution Environment' section in the generated Markdown payload. This section should explicitly remind the agent to use `uv run` or `just` commands. This ensures that even if an agent ignores `.jitsurules`, the JIT payload guarantees they know how to run tests immediately.
anti_patterns: Do not hardcode the entire JustFile into the compiler output; simply inject a standard reminder string about `uv run` and `just test` / `just verify-fast`.
